purpose: Import the useful governance invariants from karpathy/autoresearch without collapsing SparkStream/RMI into a one-file benchmark toy.
source_observations: Keep the autonomous research surface small and explicit.
Use a fixed evaluation harness and a fixed wall-clock experiment budget.
Record every experiment in a compact result ledger with commit, metric, memory, status, and description.
Keep winners and discard losers according to measured improvement.
Redirect verbose logs to files and read only compact metric summaries.
Prefer simpler code when metric quality is equal or nearly equal.
Treat crashes as experiment outcomes with bounded repair attempts.

mapping_to_sparkstream.fixed_harness: reports/benchmark_ledger.json, reports/candidate_promotion_gate.json, and benchmark cards define the evaluation contract
mapping_to_sparkstream.simplicity_gate: configs/attd_policy.json plus small_model_principle and ATTD maintenance packets
mapping_to_sparkstream.keep_discard_gate: candidate promotion gates plus experiment outcome status
